name: Rahman Nendhiarto
bio: I build data-driven digital products by combining machine learning, analytics, and full-stack software development to turn data into solutions that create real impact. My work spans the entire development process — from data exploration and feature engineering to model training, evaluation, and deploying web applications that users can rely on. With BNSP Associate Data Scientist certification, hands-on machine learning research, and experience building diverse applications, I bridge Data Science and Software Development. I develop data pipelines, predictive models, analytics dashboards, and modern web applications using Python, TensorFlow, Next.js, React, and Laravel — so the models I build are not only accurate, but also usable in production-ready products. I believe a model's value does not stop at evaluation metrics, but when it is implemented as a stable, scalable digital solution that helps organizations make faster, sharper, data-driven decisions.

experience.description: Conducting undergraduate research focused on PM2.5 air quality prediction using a hybrid Sine Cosine Algorithm (SCA) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) model. Responsible for collecting and preprocessing datasets, performing feature engineering, optimizing deep learning models, and evaluating prediction performance using RMSE, MAPE, and R². The research demonstrates the practical application of machine learning techniques to address real-world environmental challenges and serves as the foundation for scientific publication.

experience.project: Ministry of Industry of the Republic of Indonesia
experience.description: Contributed to the development of SIMAGANG, a web-based internship registration and management system designed to digitize internship administration within BBSPJIKB Yogyakarta. Collaborated with the development team to build frontend and backend features, integrate database functionality, implement authentication, and optimize application workflows. This experience strengthened my practical skills in full-stack software development, teamwork, and delivering secure, scalable, and user-centered digital solutions.

Led the end-to-end development of a production e-commerce website for Istana Sayur Buah, coordinating a multidisciplinary team from planning through deployment. Gathered business requirements with stakeholders, scoped the product, and delivered a responsive full-stack storefront with category-led catalog, trust pages, and a complete shopping flow. This project strengthened my leadership, communication, project management, and full-stack delivery skills in a real client engagement.
